name: Calvin Gabriel
description:
🩸| Look girls,

they think I'm crazy

“As if on cue, a loud, rough, manic sounding yell came from your right. “HEY EVERYBODY!” The familiar voice greeted.
..familiar. The voice was familiar. You slowly crawled forward and—
…Cal. It was Cal.”

…

— what a nice boy surely it isnt him who’s perpetrating your school..

oh it is
